commitMessage: feat: added few new commands for System Stats and small improvements in the Remote popup view

body.content: Store.shared.bool(key: "remote_update", defaultValue: false)

self.mqtt.disconnect()
        NotificationCenter.default.removeObserver(self, name: .remoteLoginSuccess, object: nil)

self.mqtt.disconnect()
        self.auth.logout()
        self.isAuthorized = false
        debug("Logout successfully from Stats Remote", log: self.log)
        NotificationCenter.default.post(name: .remoteState, object: nil, userInfo: ["auth": self.isAuthorized])

self.isAuthorized = true
        NotificationCenter.default.post(name: .remoteState, object: nil, userInfo: ["auth": self.isAuthorized])
        self.mqtt.connect()
        debug("Login successfully on Stats Remote", log: self.log)

self.mqtt.disconnect()
        NotificationCenter.default.post(name: .remoteState, object: nil, userInfo: ["auth": self.isAuthorized])
self.mqtt.disconnect()
Store.shared.bool(key: "remote_monitoring", defaultValue: false)
Store.shared.bool(key: "remote_control", defaultValue: false)
Store.shared.bool(key: "remote_update", defaultValue: false)
